descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Pembroke 4-1 at Centennial Cup tournament in Humboldt, Saskatchewan.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes defeated Ontario champion Pembroke Lumber Kings 4-1 on Monday night to advance to 2-0 in round-robin play and clinch a semifinal berth at the national junior-A hockey championships in Humboldt, Saskatchewan. Coach Orland Kurtenbach's team faces host Humboldt Broncos on Wednesday, with the winner earning a bye to Saturday's final. The Sockeyes drew heavy penalties but dominated despite spending half the game in the penalty box.

attribution.headline: Sockeyes the men in black in Centennial Cup tourney
